theme: innkeeper assigning regulars to their two favorite rooms
title: The Innkeeper's Ledger
strategies: first-fit in ledger order: walk keys in input order, place each in the first open slot (room1-cot1, room1-cot2, room2-cot1, room2-cot2, annex), never revisit a placement
frequency-priority first-fit: sort regulars by visit frequency descending, then first-fit -- locks in slots greedily and can never evict a seated guest to relieve a cycle

min-cost-flow reformulation: build a flow network (regular -> its 4 (room,cot) options + a shared annex sink with capacity s), solve exact min-cost max-flow so the annex is used proactively as a cycle-breaking relief valve whenever it lowers total weighted cost, not merely when a regular has nowhere else to go
randomized local search / simulated annealing over the assignment with annex-swap moves
